# ADR NNNN: Short, Imperative Title

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded by ADR-NNNN
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** Names or roles

## Context

What forces are at play? What problem are we solving? Describe the technical,
business, and organizational context so a future reader can understand why the
decision was necessary without having to reconstruct history from commits or
chat logs.

## Decision

The decision, stated in one or two sentences. Use active voice ("We adopt X",
"We keep Y", "We replace Z with W").

## Alternatives considered

- **Option A** — short description, pros, cons, why not.
- **Option B** — short description, pros, cons, why not.

## Consequences

Positive, negative, and neutral outcomes of the decision. Include follow-up work
this decision creates (new gates to enforce, migrations to schedule, docs to
update).
